title: acceptance: certify release candidate v0.1.0
verdict_reason: Researcher journeys and the installed wheel are green, but the tagged release cannot publish from the frozen commit: release-artifacts.yml wheel-smoke migration self-check fails (issue #670). Release must re-freeze after the fix.

image.reason: Docker is unavailable in this audit environment; image build + container smoke run only in release-artifacts.yml (CI). Not exercised locally.

checks.command: cd web && npm ci && npm run build

checks.detail: ships a real SPA (1018 bytes hub/_web/index.html)
version 0.1.0, sha=frozen commit, aggregate committed 50 rows, one named output, sample columns {user_id,total,n}

checks.command: verbatim release-artifacts.yml 'Verify the wheel-installed baseline migration' step
checks.detail: assert revisions == ['0001_schema_baseline.py'] fails: wheel ships 38 migration files (0001..0038). Filed as #670.

checks.command: cd web && CI=true DP_E2E_FIXTURE_PROFILE=full npm run e2e

checks.detail: No open P0/P1 UX golden-workflow defects.
status=done, total_rows=50, placement=local, all 5 nodes done, output committed to top_users.parquet (table top_users, version v51c4ffa1ee)

findings.summary: release-artifacts.yml migration self-check asserts a single squashed baseline; wheel ships 38 migrations, so tag v0.1.0 cannot publish.
CHANGELOG [Unreleased] states Alembic head 0012_linear_checkpoint_admission; actual head is 0038_inbox_dataset_scoped. Same root cause as #670; folded into #670.

GET /api/catalog/tables/<id>/revisions/capabilities returns 501 NOT_IMPLEMENTED for plain-file datasets (events.parquet), surfaced as a devtools-only console error on the catalog surface. Existing contract (no revision adapter -> 501); tolerated by the passing full matrix; no visible or functional impact. Captured in visual-review.json.

documented_p2_status.note: The re-freeze record (#174) declares the documented-P2 list empty; #665/#664/#666 landed the prior three P2s. None reproduced here.

not_exercised_locally: Docker image build + container smoke (no Docker; runs in release-artifacts.yml image-smoke).

Shared profile (Compose + Postgres) condensed journey and backup/restore drill (no Postgres/Compose locally; keyed-upsert-on-Postgres runs in the ux-acceptance.yml scheduled postgres-journey per #666/#669).
Maintainer human screenshot review (required before this leaf closes).
